# Agrocom

## About
Agrocom is a living marketplace for agriculture that connects farmers, buyers, and agribusinesses on one platform. It combines AI-powered crop advisory (BrainBag AI), direct trade with zero middlemen, live farm streaming, secure payments, and real-time community — built for African farmers and agricultural value chains.

## Features

### 01 — Marketplace
List products, manage orders, and reach buyers directly — no middlemen, full margin back in your pocket. Farmers list physical and digital agricultural goods; buyers transact through secure, integrated checkout.

### 02 — BrainBag AI
Your personal agricultural advisor, available 24/7. Get crop advice, pest identification, market insights, and farm management guidance through AI. The intelligence behind better farm decisions.

### 03 — Live Streaming
Host live farm tours and product showcases. Let buyers see the harvest before they buy it — increasing trust and reducing returns.

### 04 — Community
Real-time chat with farmers, buyers, and agribusinesses across the whole agricultural value chain. Cooperatives, input suppliers, and individual growers in one connected space.

### 05 — Wallet & Payments
Secure, integrated payments powered by Hyparrow. Every transaction tracked, every naira accounted for. No third-party payment apps needed.

### 06 — Agri-Tech Tools
Weather data, crop analysis, farm journal, pest identification, and smart reminders — a toolkit built to think ahead for farmers.

## Pricing

### Basic — Free
- List up to 10 products
- 4 BrainBag AI messages per day
- Community access
- Basic analytics

### Premium
- Monthly: ₦1,200 | Quarterly: ₦2,850 (save 5%) | Half Year: ₦5,500 (save 8%)
- Unlimited product listings
- Unlimited BrainBag AI
- Live streaming
- Wallet & payments
- Priority support
- Advanced analytics

### Business
- Monthly: ₦2,500 | Quarterly: ₦7,200 (save 5%) | Half Year: ₦14,500 (save 8%)
- Everything in Premium
- Team accounts
- Bulk listing tools
- Dedicated account manager
- Custom integrations
- SLA support

No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

## Key Stats
- 10,000+ farmers on the platform
- 500+ products listed and traded
- 24/7 BrainBag AI availability

## Who Agrocom Is For
- Smallholder farmers looking to sell directly to buyers
- Commercial farmers managing large-scale operations
- Agribusinesses needing procurement and supplier management
- Buyers wanting verified, direct-from-farm produce
- Agricultural cooperatives and input suppliers

## Contact
- Website: https://getagrocom.com
- Download the app for full access

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is Agrocom?
A: Agrocom is an all-in-one agricultural marketplace where farmers can list products, access AI crop advice (BrainBag), livestream farm tours, make secure payments, and connect with buyers and agribusinesses — all without middlemen.

Q: What is BrainBag AI?
A: BrainBag is Agrocom's built-in AI agricultural advisor. It provides 24/7 crop advice, pest identification, market insights, and farm management guidance. Free users get 4 messages per day; Premium and Business users get unlimited access.

Q: Can I use Agrocom for free?
A: Yes. The Basic plan is free and includes up to 10 product listings, 4 BrainBag AI messages per day, community access, and basic analytics. Premium and Business plans unlock unlimited listings, live streaming, and payments.

Q: How are payments handled?
A: Payments are processed securely through Hyparrow, integrated directly into the Agrocom platform. No third-party apps needed — every transaction is tracked and receipted automatically.

Q: Who built Agrocom?
A: Agrocom was built by Vivora Farms Limited — an agri-tech company dedicated to connecting Nigerian and African farmers to markets, finance, expertise, and technology.
